Recovering Clients from Various Scams

How we work

Book a free consultation

Case Assessment

Review Your Case: Our experts thoroughly review the details of your situation, understanding the specifics of the scam or loss.

Evidence Collection

Gather Proof: We meticulously gather all necessary evidence, including transaction records, communications, and relevant documentation.

Entity Confrontation

Engage and Confront: We identify and confront the involved entities, using our expertise to negotiate and apply pressure for recovery.

Fund Recovery

Retrieve Your Money: We work tirelessly to recover your lost funds, ensuring they are returned to you as quickly and securely as possible.

Get Your Money Back with Crypto Solutions!

Our team of experts specializes in securing refunds daily. Whether you’re a business or an individual, we’re dedicated to helping you recover funds lost to scammers. We’re constantly striving to enhance our methods and are always ready to help you reclaim what’s rightfully yours.

Disclaimer:

Crypto solutions LTD is a UK registered company with registration 14840660 

Registered office address:
2a Woodlands Road, Aigburth, Liverpool, England, L17 0AW

At Crypto Solutions, we offer each new client a free consultation. Our services, including fund recovery, are subject to fees and/or commissions based on the complexity and specifics of each individual case. Please note, Crypto Solutions does not provide investment opportunities, financial services, or financial advice.

We value your privacy and will never initiate calls without your request. We only contact clients who have reached out to us first.

Crypto Solutions does not accept prohibited payment methods. Rest assured, every payment we receive is securely processed under the PCI-DSS protocol.
